query: SELECT p.id as productId, p.name as productName, cg.id as groupId, cg.name as groupName FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 150004 AND (p.name LIKE '%sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%Sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%pote%' OR p.name LIKE '%Pote%') ORDER BY p.id, cg.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT p.id as productId, p.name as productName, cg.id as groupId, cg.name as groupName FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.categoryId = c.id LEFT JOIN complementGroups cg ON cg.productId = p.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 150004 AND (p.name LIKE '%sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%Sorvete%' OR p.name LIKE '%pote%' OR p.name LIKE '%Pote%') ORDER BY p.id, cg.id;
